{{DISPLAYTITLE:Resonance Level}} '''Resonance Level''' in the [[Gameplay Guide]]. It is acquired upon entering the Resonating Hall. ==Content== {{Description|title=Resonance Level|1=

The lowest-level memeber of Hands of Resonance sets the {{b|Resonance Level}}. Resonance heroes will automatically raise in Resonance Level.

When changing members of Hands of Resonance, their hero levels will also be {{b|swapped}}.

}}
